title: Old Bedwars Ores
description: Classic 1.13 and lower look of mainly used ores and their blocks in bedwars.
body:
**Works Fine from 1.14 to 1.21.8, It can shows warning while applying don't worry it will work fine**
# Old Bedwars Ores and Blocks
- ✨ Brings back the classic pre-1.13 textures of Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Emerald.
- 🟦 Includes both items and blocks for full retro Bedwars vibes.
- 🎮 Works from Minecraft 1.14 up to 1.21.8.

---

## ⚠️ Compatibility Note
- Tested on Vanilla Minecraft Only
- Not Tested with Mods
